text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume otaku always rises<n>early. Today,
I'm running in the<n>Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting the longest time to<n>see my two
top oshis, T.M. Opera O<n>and Meisho Doto, race
from up close.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I try to control my boiling emotions. I<n>have to stay
serious so I don't<n>offend my idols. That's the
way it<n>has to be done.
